checks.description: Run `xcodebuild test -project Pinemeter.xcodeproj -scheme Pinemeter -configuration Debug`. Expected: command exits 0 and reports `** TEST SUCCEEDED **`.

evidence.note: Full Debug XCTest suite exited 0 and reported TEST SUCCEEDED.

checks.notes: Full Debug XCTest suite passed and reported `** TEST SUCCEEDED **`.

checks.description: Inspect provider status rendering in Settings and Setup views via the provider-copy scan; confirm Gemini appears alongside Claude and ChatGPT in provider-aware copy and status rows.

evidence.note: Provider UI/model copy scan found Gemini alongside Claude and ChatGPT in setup/settings/status scope.

checks.notes: Static scan showed the shared provider UI/model scope includes Gemini and existing providers; an earlier exploratory exact-phrase check was too strict, so this check used the UAT's provider-presence requirement rather than an invented exact string.

checks.description: Run `PinemeterTests/ProviderErrorWorkflowTests` and `PinemeterTests/AppModelTests` as part of the full suite; exercise missing, configured, invalid, retry, reconnect, clear, and mixed-provider cases through tests.

evidence.note: Targeted ProviderErrorWorkflowTests and AppModelTests exited 0 and reported TEST SUCCEEDED.

checks.notes: Targeted provider recovery/status workflow tests passed, covering the Gemini recovery and shared provider state flows specified by the UAT.

checks.description: Run the full Debug test suite and confirm ChatGPT bootstrap and provider matrix expectations match the three-provider state; existing Claude and ChatGPT behavior remains compatible with Gemini-aware status collections.

evidence.note: Targeted ChatGPTAppModelTests and SecurityInvariantTests exited 0 and reported TEST SUCCEEDED.

checks.notes: Full and targeted tests passed for ChatGPT coexistence/bootstrap and security invariants under the three-provider matrix.

checks.description: Run `rg -n "Claude|ChatGPT|Gemini|provider|cookie|key" Pinemeter/Views/Settings Pinemeter/Views/Setup` and stale phrase checks for `both providers`, `two providers`, `Claude and ChatGPT only`, `Claude/ChatGPT`, and `Claude or ChatGPT`; expected: no stale two-provider phrases and no credential material disclosure.

evidence.note: Setup/settings copy scan found no stale two-provider phrases or credential-shaped literals.

checks.notes: Provider copy scan found expected provider/security references but no stale two-provider assumptions and no credential-shaped literal disclosure.

notes: All automatable artifact-driven UAT checks passed: full and targeted XCTest runs succeeded, provider copy includes Gemini with Claude and ChatGPT, stale two-provider phrases are absent, and setup/settings copy does not expose credential-shaped material.
